title: Enchantable Equipment
description: Have you ever hated that you have to Enchant Shields via the anvil and not the enchanting table?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description
Have you ever hated that you have to Enchant Shields via the anvil and not the enchanting table?

Well, with Enchantable Equipment, that problem is the thing of the past. The Daatapack makes it that all equipments that is usually unable to be enchanted via the enchanting table, possible!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
